name: aiga-notification
description: 공통 알림 서비스 (PB-NOTI-001) — notification.core capability: provider-agnostic NotificationService port, <domain>.<event> template key registry, channel routing (Email/Resend + Kakao 알림톡), send history + retry policy. EXTEND of product-builder-base packages/features/notification + packages/features/email. Framework-agnostic core + NestJS adapters for apps/server.
